title: たまには裸足になりたい

text_block_list.text: After my day out with Gold City...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Hey, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Before we go back, there's somewhere I want to
drop by first.
choice_data_list: Somewhere you want to drop by?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Yeah, follow me.

Without telling me why, Gold City takes me on
the train.

A blanket of silence falls between us and I start
feeling a bit uncomfortable. Where could she be
taking me?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Inhale... exhale...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Heh, this is amazing... It's exactly like in the
magazine!
choice_data_list: Was this place featured or something?
Was this place featured or something?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, in the issue we bought together the other
day. It said this stream would be a nice, quiet
place to relax!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: All right, I'm going in!

Gold City takes off her shoes and dips her feet
into the river.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Holy—it's freezing! Haha... It's not even funny how
cold this is!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Gyah!
choice_data_list: City?!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Oh, it was just a leaf clinging to my leg. That so
freaked me out.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Hey, if you look closely, you can see some fish
swimming around. Come here and look!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Trainer! The stall over there says they serve
grilled river fish. You never see that in the city.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: I'm getting one! I really want to try it!
choice_data_list: Is it okay to snack before dinner?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Why not? C'mon, we can share one!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Wow, that was amazing. And I feel so
rejuvenated!
choice_data_list: So... you got that mental reset you were after?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Huh, was I that obvious?
choice_data_list: What's been bothering you?
What's been bothering you?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: It's nothing major.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: I have a big show coming up, you know.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: And like, I'm used to having meetings, but there's been a lot for this one. More higher-ups have been attending, too.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
So I guess... I just wanted to catch my breath
before the show.
choice_data_list: You must've been quite nervous this whole time.
You must've been quite nervous this whole time.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Yeah... I guess I have.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Ah, I just realized—I'm out here relaxing, but this
is all still work for you, huh?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: And it's supposed to be your day off too. Sorry.
choice_data_list: There's no need to apologize.
There's no need to apologize.
It was a valuable experience.
Is there anything else you want to do?
Is there anything else you want to do?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: And it's supposed to be your day off too. Sorry.
choice_data_list: There's no need to apologize.
There's no need to apologize.
It was a valuable experience.
Is there anything else you want to do?
Is there anything else you want to do?

text_block_list.text:
I tell her that good R&R leads to a good
performance.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Yup, you are in work mode.
choice_data_list: It was fun, though, so invite me again.
It was fun, though, so invite me again.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
...You really don't know how to take a break, do
you? Guess I'll have to whisk you away again.

I wonder where Gold City will take me next time?
I grow a little excited just thinking about it.

I tell her it's not every day I get a chance to see
her in her natural element like today.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Yeah... I guess there's no point trying to put on a
"cool" act at this stage.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
choice_data_list: City?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: I should warn you, though—don't tell anyone how much I let myself loose today.
choice_data_list: I know. The secret stays with me.
I know. The secret stays with me.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: ...Okay.

Today, I got to see a whole new side of Gold
City.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Huh?
choice_data_list:
Like catching fish with your bare hands or
something.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: With my bare hands?
choice_data_list:
Or we could make boats out of leaves and race
them!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Pfft... hahaha!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: How old do you think I am?
choice_data_list: Not for you, huh?
Not for you, huh?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
More like... it's a unique idea. It does feel
nostalgic, though.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Well, try to make a more thoughtful suggestion next time we go out, okay?

I'll have to work on making better proposals, but
it was a relief to see Gold City more relaxed.
